generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values duty and order, you know how important it is to maintain our nation's strength. Did you know that our allies have been quietly reducing their defense commitments while expecting us to bear more of the burden? It's time we step up our defense spending to ensure our security and maintain our global leadership. Our troops deserve the best, and our nation's preparedness can't wait. #NationalSecurityFirst #SupportOurTroops
